Title: FYRE in Omak - Foundation for Youth Resiliency & Engagement

Title: Triple Point NCW
Description: Triple Point NCW serves LGBTQ+ youth in Chelan, Douglas, Grant, and Okanogan counties. The organization provides a safe place where youth can make positive connections, learn about community resources, receive the support they need, as well as participate in regular support group meetings with other LGBTQ+ youth and group leaders. Support group meets virtually every week on Tuesday's from 4:30-5:30pm. Group is structured with an opening check-in then an activity, speaker, discussion, or other activity. Counseling is available for participants who attend Triple Point NCW, as well as referrals and support.Also provide support in our schools for LGBTQ+ youth and education to LGBTQ+ allies and community members through anti-stigma trainings. To sign up for group or to volunteer, email or call:
